title: poa lowanensis
intro: Poa lowanensis, also known as Lowan's grass or Lowan's meadow grass, is a species of perennial grass native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa lowanensis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Poa lowanensis can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs for its therapeutic benefits.
